content: Hey .... Nikita here..
Hello
How are you??
Fine.. how's you?
I'm also fine
Great!
R u in Kedarnath right now??
Because I saw ur story that's y asking..
Not now just 4 days back I was there. Basically gone for trek to kedarnath & tungnath mahadev.
What are your hobbies?
Listing music, reading spiritual books , chit chat with my family friends
N urs?
Sorry gone for sleep
Great... Mine is to travel, listening music & play cricket
No worries
Reacted 冒聼聭聧 to your message
Good morning 冒聼聦聟
Good morning 冒聼聦聻
So are you from rajkot or mumbai?
Biodata nathi read kayro??
Yes I read... I was asking like born & bought up in mumbai or rajkot?
U r baps follower?
Not specific baps we go to all temples gurukul & baps also.
Okay
N hu onion garlic nathi khhati
So just asking don't mind
Yes I read that in your biodata.
Ema aa nathi laykhu ne
Hu actually onion/garlic khav chu.. mummy follow kre che
Tmne tamaro birth time yad hoi aapso..
Mane nathi khabar
But time km??
Papa puchhta ta..
Hi... News ma btave che bv varsad che mumbai ma...
Tmne bv vandho to nai aavyo ne?
Tme debate competition ma part leta k nai?
Bav saru hh
冒聼聵聜
Pote toh Kai bolta j nathi
Evi vaat karo cho
Nai champion 冒聼聫聠 cho ema tme
Yes mari rat khbr nai kyare thse
Haa etle j 冒聼聵聜. Bye
Yup冒聼聵聝
Thanks!
All good??
Yes but train still stuck.. it's almost 15hrs late..
Btw happy friendship day冒聼聮聲
Ohh aaje friendship day
Happy Friendship Day冒聼聮聻冒聼聵聧
Happy 2 month anniversary 冒聼聵聜冒聼聵聜冒聼聵聜
Ohh yaa
Same too you

Like aavi rite toh hmna aapda lgn thai jse
Ha e toh che

Thank you so much mari life ma avva mate冒聼陇聴.....tame sache bv mst cho ...冒聼楼掳 Mari life nu best decision....冒聼聦聣冒聼聨聣.Ha me evu kidhu tmne k mare mumbai javu che Rajkot nthi revu ...e mari mistakes hti .. 冒聼聶聫but hve hu evu kyarey nai bolu....冒聼聶聫toh pn tme kyarey mara pr gusso nthi kyro ....冒聼聵聵mne pchi realise thyu k mare evu na bolay ...冒聼聵聬tmne kevu laygu hse ....and ha ik  mari life change thay che but tmari pn thay j che e mare vicharvu joie ..冒聼聵聡冒聼聵聤.and hu dhyan rakhis k rov nai and gusso pn nai ..aaje 2 months complete thya aapdi engagement 冒聼搂驴芒聺陇茂赂聫 je bv j mst hta....冒聼聵聧aapde hji Puri life nu countdown sathe krsu ..冒聼陇聴冒聼楼掳.aapdu future bv mst hse..冒聼聵聧 j pn hse saru j hse hu mara side thi best try kris tmne khush rakhvani and hu pn khush rav ....冒聼聮聲冒聼聵聡冒聼陇聴aapde bv msti maja krsu aapdi life ma and frsu pn and haa hu akshar mandir pn jais冒聼聵聟冒聼陇聴冒聼聵聧one again thanks for being part of my life冒聼陇聴and sry for whatever mistakes I did冒聼楼潞love you芒聺陇茂赂聫
Wishing you a very Happy and our first Diwali my love冒聼陋聰芒聺陇茂赂聫冒聼聵聵

Dear Raj芒聺陇茂赂聫
New year start thva jai rhyu che冒聼陇聴 ...last year kevi rite gyu khbr j na pdi....last year bhagwan ne pray kri hti k aa new year mari life no ek adhuro hisso puro kri dejo ....冒聼聵聤je bhgwan e bv mst tmari language ma awesome rite puro kyro ....and bv j mst che 冒聼陇漏 ....
 Hve nu je new year start thva jai rhyu che e bv j sari rite jaay ...a冒聼聵聡apdi life nu aa new year bv bdhi happiness laine aave aa year ma aapde saptpadi na fera fari hmesha mate ek thvana vchan levana chiye .芒聶戮茂赂聫...je hmesha aapde nibhavi skiye ...冒聼陇聺冒聼陇聻芒聺陇茂赂聫and hu tmari and mari new family ni bdhi j expections Puri kri sku .....aapdu jivan life na bdha j ups and downs ma stable rhi ske ...bs ej prayers che ....冒聼聵聡芒聺陇茂赂聫

Happy new year  Raj 芒聺陇茂赂聫 
Thank you so much mari life ma aavva mate 冒聼陇聴 
Mari life ne complete krva mate 芒聺陇茂赂聫 
Evu ntu k life atyare sudhi mst nati ...mst j hti ...but tmara avva thi awesome thy gy che 冒聼陇漏冒聼陇聴芒聺陇茂赂聫
Love you so much 冒聼聵聵冒聼聵聵

Happy 3rd month engagement anniversary my Raj冒聼楼掳冒聼陇聴冒聼搂驴 thank for coming in my life 冒聼聮聯冒聼聮聯  you complete me冒聼聵聵冒聼陇漏 bs ek vat yaad rakhjo k hu hmesha tmari sathe j chu koi pn situation ma because first we are best friend and than life partner冒聼陇聴芒聺拢茂赂聫冒聼聮聲..... aapde life share krsu toh pchi ek bija ne vaat krvama km vicharvu.冒聼楼潞.....tme j kidhu tu k aapde ek bija ne koi pn vaat share kri skiye chiye .冒聼聵聡...and don't worry bdhu j mst che , and thase ...冒聼聵聧冒聼聵聤. because aapde sathe hsu and aapda sathe bhgwan 冒聼陇聻冒聼陇聺芒聺拢茂赂聫 and tmare yaad krvu j hoy ne toh mst mst vstu yaad kro for example tmaro cupboard 1/3 maro hse , bed pchi hu ketli bdhi shopping kris tmne ketlu heran kris evu bdhu yaad kro 冒聼聵聟冒聼聵聜....bs yaarr aatlu j yaad aave che ...ek toh last 2 hrs thi msg type kru chu etlu disturbance che冒聼聵聜冒聼聵聜...btw I love you very very much Raj冒聼聮聲冒聼聵聧Miss you 冒聼楼潞冒聼陇聴

Hu tne aaje jyare aa time pr 6 month pela maydi tyare vichayru ntu k after 6 month Tara naam ni mehendi hmesha mate mara hath ma mukai gy hse....冒聼陇聴芒聺拢茂赂聫
